parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.first().json, skipped: true, reason: 'Already a customer' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.business_id, source: $json.source, wc_order_id: String($json.wc_order_id || ''), name: $json.name, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, city: $json.city, country: $json.country, order_total: $json.order_total, currency: $json.currency, products_interested: $json.products, lead_score: $json.lead_score, lead_grade: $json.lead_grade, lead_priority: $json.lead_priority, score_reasons: $json.score_reasons, status: 'new', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_activity: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: $json.isNew ? 'Lead captured' : 'Lead updated', lead_score: $json.lead_score, lead_grade: $json.lead_grade, priority: $json.lead_priority }) }}
